## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass, and I read the output.
- [ ] Lint passes.
- [ ] No credentials. (If one ever reached the remote: rotate it — removing the commit is not enough.)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] No volatile state added to `CLAUDE.md`.
